title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 100.445 - Allowable rates of interest
text:
100.445.  Allowable rates of interest. — If the interest rates allowed under the provisions of this act* are greater than the interest rates allowed under the provisions of senate bill no. 554** of the second regular session of the eightieth general assembly, then the interest rates allowed under this act* shall prevail over the interest rates set in senate bill no. 554**.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1477 § 2) 
*"This act" (H.B. 1477, 1980) contained this section and sections 100.310, 100.330, 100.390, 100.400, 100.410 and 100.440. 
**Senate Bill 554 of the second regular session of the 80th General Assembly, 1980, enacted sections 108.450, 108.455, 108.460, 108.465, 108.470.
